quebec_public_sector_identity.neq_rule: Record Numéro d'entreprise du Québec (NEQ) only after REQ lookup under HITL; never invent or copy from unofficial sources.
quebec_public_sector_identity.purpose: Bind major Québec public and para-public legal persons to mesh grid stewardship so the state-owned or mandated entity—not an unnamed vendor—owns mandate, work product, and team accountability for protecting its grid.
